Class RarityManager

java.lang.Object
dev.agam.skyblockitems.rarity.RarityManager
public class RarityManager extends Object
Manages the ItemRarity system - loading, applying, and removing rarities from items.

  • Method Details

    • markSurvivalInventoryEdited

      public void markSurvivalInventoryEdited(UUID playerId)
      Called from inventory click/drag (survival) so RarityTask does not run in the same window.

    • shouldDeferPeriodicInventoryScan

      public boolean shouldDeferPeriodicInventoryScan(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)

    • loadConfig

      public void loadConfig()
      Loads or reloads the rarity configuration.

    • getRarity

      public Rarity getRarity(String identifier)
      Gets a rarity by its identifier (case-insensitive).

    • getDefaultRarity

      public Rarity getDefaultRarity()
      Gets the default rarity.

    • getAllRarities

      public Collection<Rarity> getAllRarities()
      Gets all available rarities.

    • getCheckerTime

      public int getCheckerTime()
      Gets the checker task interval in ticks.

    • getRarityForItem

      public Rarity getRarityForItem(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Determines the rarity for an item based on config rules. Does not check for custom-assigned rarity (use hasCustomRarity for that).

    • getRarityForItem

      public Rarity getRarityForItem(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, io.lumine.mythic.lib.api.item.NBTItem nbtItem)

    • getCurrentRarity

      public Rarity getCurrentRarity(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Gets the current rarity of an item from NBT.

    • getCurrentRarity

      public Rarity getCurrentRarity(io.lumine.mythic.lib.api.item.NBTItem nbtItem)

    • hasCustomRarity

      public boolean hasCustomRarity(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Checks if an item has a custom (command-assigned) rarity.

    • hasCustomRarity

      public boolean hasCustomRarity(io.lumine.mythic.lib.api.item.NBTItem nbtItem)

    • applyRarity

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack applyRarity(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, Rarity rarity, boolean isCustom)
      Applies a rarity to an item, updating NBT, name, and lore.
      Parameters:
      item - The item to modify
      rarity - The rarity to apply
      isCustom - True if this is a command-assigned rarity (takes priority)
      Returns:
      The modified item

    • removeRarity

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack removeRarity(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, boolean isCustom)
      Removes rarity from an item (NBT and lore). Sets rarity to "NONE".
      Parameters:
      isCustom - If true, marks as custom (prevent auto-assign). If false, it's just cleanup.

    • processItem

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack processItem(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Processes an item - applies rarity if needed. Respects custom rarity priority.
      Returns:
      The processed item (may be unchanged)

    • updateRarityLore

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack updateRarityLore(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, Rarity rarity)
      Updates the item's lore with rarity information.

    • stripRarityLore

      public List<String> stripRarityLore(List<String> lore)
      Strips rarity-related lines from lore.

    • saveMapping

      public void saveMapping(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, String rarityId)

    • saveMapping

      public void saveMapping(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, String rarityId, io.lumine.mythic.lib.api.item.NBTItem nbt)

    • saveMapping

      public void saveMapping(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, String rarityId, boolean refresh, io.lumine.mythic.lib.api.item.NBTItem nbt)

    • deferInventoryRarityApply

      public void deferInventoryRarityApply(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Schedules processInventory(org.bukkit.entity.Player, boolean, boolean) coalesced per player. Two passes (ticks +1 and +2); merge only on survival/adventure.

    • processInventory

      public void processInventory(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Full pass with client refresh; does not merge stacks.

    • processInventory

      public void processInventory(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, boolean notifyClient)
      Same as processInventory(org.bukkit.entity.Player, boolean, boolean) with mergeStacks=false.

    • processInventory

      public void processInventory(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, boolean notifyClient, boolean mergeStacks)
      Parameters:
      notifyClient - when true, calls Player.updateInventory() if any slot changed
      mergeStacks - when true, merges ItemStack.isSimilar(ItemStack) stacks in hotbar+main (0–35). Use only from deferInventoryRarityApply(Player); keep false for join, UI, pickup, periodic.

    • processContainerInventory

      public void processContainerInventory(org.bukkit.inventory.Inventory inventory)
      Applies rarity rules to every slot in a block inventory (chest, shulker, etc.).

    • removeMapping

      public void removeMapping(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)

    • getItemKey

      public String getItemKey(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Generates a unique config key for an ItemStack. SHARP: Prioritizes UUID for persistence.

    • getItemKey

      public String getItemKey(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, boolean ignoreUUID)

    • getBaseKey

      public String getBaseKey(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)

    • getItemKey

      public String getItemKey(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, io.lumine.mythic.lib.api.item.NBTItem nbtItem)

    • getItemKey

      public String getItemKey(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, io.lumine.mythic.lib.api.item.NBTItem nbtItem, boolean ignoreUUID)

    • isAllowedInventory

      public boolean isAllowedInventory(org.bukkit.inventory.InventoryView view)
      Checks if an inventory is allowed to have rarities processed in it.
